scripts.preview: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.test: tsc -b && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && node --test tests/startup.test.mjs tests/server.integration.test.mjs tests/store.test.mjs tests/signal-events.test.mjs tests/notifications.test.mjs tests/data-cleanup.test.mjs tests/appearance.test.mjs
scripts.test:server: node --test tests/startup.test.mjs tests/server.integration.test.mjs tests/store.test.mjs tests/signal-events.test.mjs tests/notifications.test.mjs tests/data-cleanup.test.mjs tests/appearance.test.mjs
